commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The LORD has sworn by his right hand, and by the arm of his strength, Surely I will no more give your grain to be food for your enemies; and the sons of the foreigner shall not drink your wine, for which you have labored: Hand; inviolably, Deuteronomy xxxii. The Persians deemed this oath most sacred. (Calmet) Darius, just expiring, said to Polycrates, "By thee I give this right hand to Alexander "(Plut. ) that he may revenge my death. The Church cannot be deprived of her faith or of her God.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
